task_type: subjective — direction memo, no correct answer; grader-stability test on non-legible work

workers.copilot: GitHub Copilot CLI, resolved model claude-fable-5

worker_bets.copilot: ship Rate (grading loop) into the product, thin end-to-end; freeze everything else; one security carve-out (approved-shell injection)
worker_bets.copilot-gpt54: one closed learning loop for build-mode code work, nothing else primary
worker_bets.kimi: closed-loop Rate layer: grading -> automatic routing-weight/roster updates
worker_bets.grok: one trustworthy path from intent to merged code on the local-first stack (trust/verification over new engines)
worker_bets.codex: past toy stage, not past prototype trust — stabilization-leaning

context_lean_note: 3/5 workers converged on Rate — evidence-driven, not independent invention: the context package itself (philosophy declares 'the grading loop is the engine'; graph report shows no scoring community) points at the gap.

observations.stability: 3/5 identical rankings (task-001: 4/5) — held up better than predicted on subjective work
observations.graded_judgment_not_agreement: graders ranked grok's trust-path memo 1st even though 3/5 of them (as workers) bet Rate — kimi-the-grader put the opposing position first
observations.gpt54_contrarian_confirmed: second consecutive outlier, amplitude grew: put grok LAST where four graders put it FIRST, uniquely crowned codex. Candidate calibration offset for Rate.
observations.self_preference: grok ranked itself 1st but 3/4 rivals agreed — unproven; watch across tasks
observations.score_compression: overall scores 7.5-8.5 (task-001: 6.0-9.25) — subjective work inflates scores while ranks still separate; rank-primary design vindicated
observations.verbosity: length still tracks rank (grok longest -> 1st; gpt-5.4 shortest -> last) across a different length order than task-001 — now the #1 confound; consider a length-capped task-003

human_grading.blind_set: anonymized/candidate-{A..E}.md, fresh shuffle (seed 99260702), mapping held in conductor scratchpad
human_grading.note: anchor grade doubles as the actual six-week roadmap decision
